json_data.title: Meta-Learning (Learning to Learn)
json_data.reason: It provides a broader theoretical framework for understanding how systems can learn to optimize their own learning process, of which Neural Architecture Search is a prime example.

json_data.title: Automated Machine Learning (AutoML)
json_data.reason: AutoML extends the principles of automation from architecture design to the entire machine learning pipeline, including data pre-processing, feature engineering, and hyperparameter optimization.

json_data.title: Hardware-aware NAS and Efficient AI
json_data.reason: This field investigates how to effectively design neural architectures that are not only accurate but also optimized for specific hardware constraints, pushing the boundaries of deployable AI.
